findings.message: CLAUDE.md has no instructions for how to build or run the project
CLAUDE.md has no test command instructions
CLAUDE.md has no section covering required tools, versions, or setup steps
Vague quantifier 'appropriate' used without measurable criteria
Unauthenticated network call to GitHub API to list categories in remote mode
Unauthenticated network call to GitHub API to list agent files for a category
Downloads a remote .md agent definition and writes it into ~/.claude/agents/ or .claude/agents/ with no checksum/integrity verification and no pinning to a commit SHA
tools/subagent-catalog/*.md commands are not referenced by any plugin.json but are documented as a separately-installed tool in their own README, not an orphan
Unauthenticated fetch of README.md from raw.githubusercontent.com on the mutable main ref, cached locally with no signature/checksum verification
User-controlled {{NAME}} placeholder from $ARGUMENTS is substituted directly into a shell command template with no escaping guidance, allowing quote-breakout injection
{{PATH}} placeholder is substituted unsanitized into a curl URL/shell command with no path validation, enabling path traversal or shell injection
User-controlled {{NAME}} placeholder from $ARGUMENTS is substituted directly into a shell command template with no escaping guidance, allowing quote-breakout injection
{{PATH}} placeholder is substituted unsanitized into a curl URL/shell command with no path validation, enabling path traversal or shell injection
Unauthenticated network call to GitHub API to list categories in remote mode — curl -s "$GITHUB_API_BASE/categories" with response parsed via grep/sed, no auth, no pinned ref
Unauthenticated network call to GitHub API to list agent files for a category — curl -s "$GITHUB_API_BASE/categories/$category" with response parsed via grep/sed

Downloads a remote .md agent definition and writes it into ~/.claude/agents/ or .claude/agents/ with no checksum/integrity verification and no pinning to a commit SHA — curl -sS "$url" -o "$dest_path" writes remote content directly to the install directory with no integrity check

Unauthenticated fetch of README.md from raw.githubusercontent.com on the mutable main ref, cached locally with no signature/checksum verification — curl -sf --connect-timeout 5 --max-time 30 "$SUBAGENT_CATALOG_REPO_URL/README.md" -o "$SUBAGENT_CATALOG_CACHE_FILE.tmp" fetches from the mutable main ref with no integrity check
CLAUDE.md has no instructions for how to build or run the project — No section of CLAUDE.md describes a build or run command for the project
CLAUDE.md has no test command instructions — No section of CLAUDE.md describes how to run tests
CLAUDE.md has no section covering required tools, versions, or setup steps — No prerequisites/setup section present in CLAUDE.md

Vague quantifier 'appropriate' used without measurable criteria — Line 58: 'Format for main README: `- [**agent-name**](path/to/agent.md) - Brief description`' preceded by 'Add link in appropriate category (alphabetical order)' with no measurable criteria for 'appropriate'
tools/subagent-catalog/*.md commands are not referenced by any plugin.json but are documented as a separately-installed tool in their own README, not an orphan
